name: Fimiguerrero
description: '''Fimihan Uthman Akinola''' (born 24 February 2001), better known as '''Fimiguerrero''', is a British-Nigerian rapper. Born in Nigeria, he moved to [[London]] at three months old. A member of the [[UK underground rap]] scene, he has released multiple mixtapes, including ''Conglomerate'', a collaboration with [[Lancey Foux]] and [[Len (rapper)|Len]], in 2024. Akinola's music has been described as [[rage (music genre)|rage]] and  "eclectic hyper-[[jerk (music genre)|jerk]]".
